title: elattostachys nervosa
intro: Elattostachys nervosa, also known as the "Nervine Tree," is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders. Elattostachys nervosa has been found to possess a range of health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
